race.comment: DON'T DOUBT FRANK (9) settled well back before stoking up late to finish fourth on debut over 1100m at Hawkesbury last start. Nicely placed over an extra 100m on a bigger track. Great chance to break through in a moderate maiden. EXIT CLAUSE (1) was slowly into stride then really went through his gears in good style to get up for third when facing the starter for the first time over 1100m at Warwick Farm 17 days ago. Gets a firmer surface today and over a slightly longer trip will be hard to hold out. Debutant GENESIS RUNNER (5) won a recent Rosehill trial, his fifth since January. Looks ready for this. TIGHTROPE WALKER (8) wasn't far away in a Gosford trial on 18 May and can make his mark on debut.
